untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires complex multi-timeframe identification of 'double bottom' structure (two distinct lows with recovery between them) and dynamic target allocation based on 7 different rise targets (5%/10%/15%/25%/50%/75%/>75%) with context-dependent success rates. Standard indicators cannot identify the precise two-bottom formation or automatically classify and route to specific targets. Market regime classification (bull vs bear) also requires external regime detection beyond available indicators. Stop placement marked AUTHOR_SILENT adds further ambiguity.
